name: foundry-paste-eater
description: Paste media, URLs, and contextual text into tiles, tokens, notes, and chat.

scripts.copy: npm run build:runtime && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp ./foundry-paste-eater.js dist/ && cp ./foundry-paste-eater.css dist/ && cp ./README.md dist/ && cp ./TESTING.md dist/ && cp ./CHANGELOG.md dist/ && cp ./LICENSE.md dist/ && cp ./module.json dist/ && cp -R ./templates dist/
scripts.copyWin: npm run build:runtime && if exist dist rmdir /S /Q dist && mkdir dist && copy module.json dist && copy foundry-paste-eater.js dist && copy foundry-paste-eater.css dist && copy README.md dist && copy TESTING.md dist && copy CHANGELOG.md dist && copy LICENSE.md dist && xcopy templates dist\templates /E /I /Y
